title: stenotaphrum compressum
intro: Stenotaphrum compressum, also known as buffalo grass or St. Augustine grass, is a type of warm-season grass native to tropical Africa and widely cultivated as a turf grass in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenotaphrum compressum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stenotaphrum compressum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
